Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka asked me to check on Amada...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This could be a good opportunity[n]to get to know him better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Amada is in his room...[n]This could be a good opportunity[n]to get to know him better.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sounds like he's doing[n]something in his room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like Amada is in his room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know you must be busy, but do you have time to come with me tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like Amada wants me to[n]accompany him somewhere.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}Thanks. I wasn't sure if I'd be able to go there alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'd like to head over to Port Island Station now if that's okay with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I probably need your help to go there... I'll ask again when you seem free.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}Did you see my message? I have a request for you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like he has some business with me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7009 0 0}Um, {f 4 1}-san, do you have some spare time right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like he has some business with me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7040 0 0}Thank you. Well, let's head to the roof first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7021 0 0}Oh, I see. Well, maybe next time. Hopefully, you'll be free then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7068 0 0}Thanks for coming. Do you have a moment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like he was waiting for me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7009 0 0}{f 4 1}-san, do you have some time to spare right now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening with Amada?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7026 0 0}I see. Well, next time, I guess, then.[n]{f 1 1}
